reviews.comment:
Esta calificación va por la parrilla que esta atras del aca, alto chori! Y los baños de atras junto a la parrilla impecables y era hora pico

(Translated by Google)
This rating goes to the grill behind us, stop chori! And the bathrooms in the back next to the grill were spotless, and it was rush hour.
